chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.013 — List of Permits Issued

(a) The department shall make available on the department’s Internet website a searchable and downloadable list by county of each permit issued under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) . The list must include the following information for each permit:

    (1) the name and address of the person for whom the permit was issued;

    (2) the vehicle identification number and license plate number of the vehicle;

    (3) the permit number; and

    (4) the effective date of the permit.

(b) On request of a county, the department shall send a copy of the permit and the bond or letter of credit required for the permit to the county.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 410 (S.B.1814), Sec. 4, eff. September 1, 2021.*

the vehicle identification number and license plate number of the vehicle;
the effective date of the permit.
